meta.title: WISE Top 100 Series
meta.scoring_methodology: Editorial portfolio heuristic (0-100). portfolio_score = round(0.35*recognition_score + 0.35*demand_score + 0.30*commercial_score, 1). Scores are curatorial estimates for product prioritization, not measured analytics. For curated groups, base scores descend by curatorial priority with deterministic per-id variation.
meta.note: Curatorial seed for the Phase 12 Products catalogue and Phase 10 Publishing collections.
